title: zanach #2186
definition:
1) to cast off, reject, spurn
    1a) (Qal) to reject
    1b) (Hiphil) to forcefully reject someone
 2) to stink, emit stench, become odious
    2a) (Hiphil) stink (perfect)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to cast off, reject, spurn
    1a) (Qal) to reject
    1b) (Hiphil) to forcefully reject someone
 2) to stink, emit stench, become odious
    2a) (Hiphil) stink (perfect)

    NASB:  to reject, spurn
